name: Spinach Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Cooked Spinach, minced and well drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, stir together 2-1/4 cups of the flour and salt.
2. Make a well in the center.
3. Combine eggs, spinach, water, and oil; add to flour and mix well.
4. Sprinkle the remaining flour on a board.
5. Knead for 10 minutes.
6. Let rest for 10 minutes.
7. Cut into desired shape.
Makes 1-1/4 pounds fresh pasta.
